text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p:
Mirrors UserDto on the .NET side
(emitted by tools/Enterprise.Platform.DtoGen).
Date-fields land as ISO-8601 strings —
never materialised into Date in models.

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p:
Different shape from PagedResponse<T>:
 items / pageNumber / pageSize / totalCount
vs. data / page / pageSize / total / totalPages.
Feature-local translation, no global mapper.

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p: Backend caps PageSize at 200.\nactiveOnly is null = include all,\ntrue = only active, false = only inactive.
